SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF IVAN BEIKOV VIA COURTCALL WITH WITNESS, DAUGHTER, KRISTINA BEIKOVA WHO APPEARED IN PERSON. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HEALTH SERVICE SYSTEM'S REPRESENTATIVE BRIAN CAULEY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEIKOV, IVAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HEALTH SERVICE SYSTEM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2016 - CONTINUED TO OCT-12-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT HEALTH SERVICE SYSTEM WAS UNWILLING TO HAVE THE MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE KRISTINA BEIKOV, DAUGHTER OF IVAN BEIKOV, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE BRIAN CAULEY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER WITH THE SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-12-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S DAUGHTER, KRISTINA BEIKOVA APPEARED; THE COURT DECLARES SHE IS NOT ABLE TO REPRESENT HER FATHER IN THIS MATTER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HEALTH SERVICE SYSTEM REPRESENTATIVE BRIAN CAULEY AND WITNESS MICHAEL VISCONTI, CONTRACTS MANAGER FOR HSS. DEFENDANT WAIVES IMPROPER PROCESS OF SERVICE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO DEC. 12, 2016 AT 3:30PM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
